name: value-council
description: A-Share Value Council — your open-source value-investing copilot.

scripts.desktop:dist: pnpm --filter @vc/desktop build && cd apps/desktop && npx electron-builder
scripts.desktop:portable: pnpm --filter @vc/desktop build && cd apps/desktop && npx electron-builder --win portable
scripts.desktop:nsis: pnpm --filter @vc/desktop build && cd apps/desktop && npx electron-builder --win nsis
